title: Extract remaining hardcoded strings and aria-labels
objective: Move every remaining hardcoded string and aria-label in src/App.tsx into the translation namespaces so they respond to the active UI language, including fixing the Polish-only fallback heading.

include: Audit every view in App.tsx for strings/aria-labels not sourced from translation namespaces.
Move each into the appropriate namespace and replace the literal with a translation lookup.
Fix the Polish-only fallback heading to respond to UI language.
exclude: Layout or component structure changes beyond string replacement.
API error translation layer, formatting, switcher, pluralization, or test migration work.

done: No hardcoded string literals remain in App.tsx JSX outside translation lookups.
All aria-labels respond to the active UI language.
App.test.tsx asserts key screens render translated text/aria-labels in both en and pl.
